sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105224" key="trise/xqistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐσ-έχθιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105224.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-detested,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.112B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.112B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
